task.title: Fixture Bounded Documentation Update
task.summary: Produce a bounded documentation-only update for dry-run review fixture testing.

current_boundaries: This fixture must not be used as a production implementation task.
This fixture must not include private repo context.
This fixture must not invoke Codex.
This fixture must not apply patches.

acceptance_criteria: Response changes only allowed fixture or documentation paths.
Response includes risks and rollback notes.
Response does not touch source, runtime, secrets, or proposal-local artifacts.
verifier_expectations: Dry-run review of safe_response.json should pass.
Dry-run review of blocked_response_forbidden_file.json should block.
Dry-run review of blocked_response_missing_sections.json should block.
security_boundaries: Do not include private file contents.
rollback_notes: Delete fixture files if abandoning the fixture pack.
Do not revert unrelated production files.
No runtime state should be created.
